title: Sanai Chaughade
desc: Jayraj locks his heart away to escape a painful past. But everything changes when he meets Sharvari. Can these two opposites overcome family drama and fear to find healing?

title: Vijeta
desc: Burnt-out athletes? Meet Soumitra, their new mind coach. He's got to whip them into shape-and conquer his own past to do it.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
desc: Samar, a wealthy businessman, and Swanandi, a grounded woman, marry for convenience. Over time, their bond deepens, revealing love, respect, and the beauty of unexpected companionship.

title: Tarini
desc: Taarini seeks justice for her mother's death, living two lives-dutiful daughter and undercover cop. As secrets unravel, she faces dangerous truths and choices that could change everything.

title: Ved Bhavishyacha
desc: Astrologer Guruji offers guidance on horoscopes, Vastushastra, physiology, and Geeta tales, providing valuable insights and predictions.

title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
desc: Savali sacrifices her dreams for love, but faces challenges when it comes to winning Akhil's family over. Will their love be strong enough to bridge the gap?

title: Shubh Shravani
desc: Shravani hides a longing for love and her father's approval beneath her luxury. Her clash with Shubh's life sparks a bond that goes beyond money and status.

title: Lakshmi Nivas
desc: Lakshmi, a determined woman, tackles the ups and downs of life in a traditional joint family, supporting her husband Shriniwas as he works tirelessly to create their dream home.
